title: BoxLegend Vacuum Storage Bags Vacuum Bags - 10 Large 80x60cm Double Zip Seal Reusable Airtight Bags Vacuum Pack Storage Bags for Duvets, Bedding, Pillow, Clothes, Quilt, Sweater, Comforter, Suitcase
features: [10 Large Bags] The Compression Sealer Bags include 10 Large compression bags (80 x 60cm) for storing your duvets, blankets, pillows or clothes for different seasons. They are great helpers for your storage, traveling and home moving.
[Save 3-8X Space] The 10 vacuum storage bags sets help you save up to 80% of storage space. You will get more storage place for your suitcase, closets, basements, lofts and garages.
[Great Airtight Effect] The Double-Zip Seal and Triple-Seal Turbo Valve can better avoid air from getting in again, keeping long-term vacuum effect.

[Thickened Material] These airtight bags are made of PA+PE material and the thickness of the vacuum bags is increased to 80 microns instead of 70 microns, prevent air leakage and will not tear when squeezed.
[Protect Clothing] With our vacuum bags, the textiles will be protected from dust, moisture. No matter in the basement or under the bed, the contents of the bags remain 100% clean and dry.
description: Product Description BoxLegend vacuum bags can be your best helper for HOME and TRAVEL! Do you want to have more space for your wardrobe or suitcase? Do you want to better store your clothes and sheets when the season changes? Are you still looking for stronger and thicker vacuum bags? Maximum Optimize Storage Space BoxLegend Space Saving bags can help you reduce the volume of clothing, bedding, down jackets, hoodies or seasonal clothing by up to 80%. Vacuum Storage Bags 10 PCS Include: - 10 * Large 80x60cm Capacity: 1-2 Quilt 2-3 Pillows 3-5 Down jacket 8-15 Sweaters 5-10 Pants Tips: 1. Use the clip to seal the zipper back and forth 3-4 times. 2. Vacuum air out with a vacuum cleaner. Please do not remove the pink air cushion. 3. Close the blue lid immediately after evacuating the air. 4. Make sure the zipper and blue turbo valve cover are fully sealed and the vacuum bag does not make any leaking sound. Double seal zipper and triple zeal turbo valve can keep airtight and waterproof, better protecting your clothes, bedding sheets, pillows, blankets. Note: When you open the Turbo Valve cover, do not take the pink air pad out even if you are going to vacuum out air because it can help enhance the airtightness.
